connectorUiConfig.title: CheckpointHEC_CL On Demand Email Security (via Codeless Connector Platform)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: CheckpointHEC_CL Email Security data connector provides the capability to get Check Point security event data

sampleQueries.query:
CheckpointHEC_CL
 | where EventType == 'message'
 | sort by TimeGenerated desc

dataTypes.name: CheckpointHEC_CL
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
CheckpointHEC_CL
            | summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
            | where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: read and write permissions on the workspace are required.

parameters.content: Create an Application in Azure AD and create an application secret and key. To be used latest
Assign the application created the role Monitoring Metrics Publisher on the DRC created
